summary: Human and AI designed an open .skill protocol, shipped scoped npm packages, and discussed continuity handoff versus release mint. Secrets redacted.

candidates.title: Scoped npm monorepo publishing
candidates.intent: Publish workspace packages under a scoped npm name with public access and correct pack contents.

candidates.title: Work continuity handoff
candidates.intent: Export a continuity .skill so another agent can resume without private dumps.

candidates.title: Missing-context compile gates
candidates.intent: Refuse release compile when SkillContract declarations are incomplete and report field-specific fixes.
